command_help_goldens.output:
Usage: corvus [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...

 Corvus trusted coding agent

┌─ Options ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ --version                     Show version                                                                                                                                                                                                 │
│ --install-completion          Install completion for the current shell.                                                                                                                                                                    │
│ --show-completion             Show completion for the current shell, to copy it or customize the installation.                                                                                                                             │
│ --help                        Show this message and exit.                                                                                                                                                                                  │
└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
┌─ Commands ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ chat    Start or resume a policy-controlled conversation.                                                                                                                                                                                  │
│ run     Launch the live multi-chat conversational terminal.                                                                                                                                                                                │
│ doctor  Check runtime, state, keyring, and sandbox health.                                                                                                                                                                                 │
│ trace   Inspect and verify a redacted execution trace.                                                                                                                                                                                     │
│ review  Review a delivery bundle; JSON mode is always read-only.                                                                                                                                                                           │
│ undo    Undo a delivery only when delivered files have not diverged.                                                                                                                                                                       │
│ eval    Run deterministic, non-live capability evaluations.                                                                                                                                                                                │
│ model   Configure model providers                                                                                                                                                                                                          │
│ memory  Inspect and control project memory                                                                                                                                                                                                 │
│ skills  Inspect and control versioned skills                                                                                                                                                                                               │
└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

Usage: corvus run [OPTIONS]

 Launch the live multi-chat conversational terminal.

┌─ Options ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ --project                            DIRECTORY                  Default project context                                                                                                                                                    │
│ --subagents        --no-subagents                               Allow bounded analysis subagents for this Corvus window                                                                                                                    │
│ --max-subagents                      INTEGER RANGE [1<=x<=4]    Maximum children per root turn and concurrently                                                                                                                            │
│ --sandbox                            [auto|docker|podman|none]  Sandbox for this window: auto, docker, podman, or none (chat-only; /build disabled)                                                                                        │
│ --setup                                                         Run first-time setup again before opening chat                                                                                                                             │
│ --help                                                          Show this message and exit.                                                                                                                                                │
└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

commands.help: Start or resume a policy-controlled conversation.
Check runtime, state, keyring, and sandbox health.
Install Corvus's tested official Codex CLI release for the current user.
Open the official Codex browser flow and select it as the active provider.
Check the official Codex/ChatGPT sign-in without reading its tokens.
Select which configured provider Corvus uses.
Review a delivery bundle; JSON mode is always read-only.
Launch the live multi-chat conversational terminal.
Promote only with an explicit passing evaluation result.
Inspect and verify a redacted execution trace.
Undo a delivery only when delivered files have not diverged.
